title: Weekly SAP AI Digest — Week of March 13, 2026
summary: This week in SAP AI: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here, Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners, SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market and more. Full roundup of Joule, AI Core, Generative AI Hub, and SAP Business AI updates.

title: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here: Building the Foundation for Intelligent Procurement
summary: SAP Ariba has been revamped with a focus on AI-driven procurement. This upgrade aims to improve efficiency and decision-making in the procurement process.

title: Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners
summary: SAP has announced its 2026 Partner Awards, recognizing top-performing partners globally. The awards honor partners that have excelled in helping customers achieve their goals.

title: SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market
summary: SAP introduces Distributed Energy Resources to unlock energy flexibility market value. It requires data orchestration beyond connectivity to achieve this goal.

title: Strengthening Customer Experience Across the Lead-to-Cash Journey
summary: Companies are increasingly linking customer experience to operational efficiency to streamline the lead-to-cash journey. This integration matters as it can lead to improved customer satisfaction and reduced costs.
